2025-05-07T13:22:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2025-05-07T13:22:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port from 9 May to early m
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸在2025年5月9至14日凌晨或會實施特別交通安排

2025-05-08T15:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Motorists are advised that, the number of cross-boundary private cars travelling to and from the Mainland and Macao via the land boundary control points may increase during the period from 9 May to early morning of 14 May 2025. Subject to actual traffic conditions, special traffic arrangements may be implemented at Lok Ma Chau Control Point and Shenzhen Bay Port from 9 May to early morning of 14 May 2025 to allow smooth access of public transport vehicles to above control points. Cross-boundary private cars may need to queue up for crossing the control points. Motorists are advised to pay extra attention to variable message signs and traffic signs along the road. They are also advised to be patient in case of traffic congestion, and follow the instructions of the on-site Police.
2025-05-08T15:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 駕駛人士請注意，在2025年5月9至14日凌晨期間經各陸路管制站往來內地及澳門的跨境私家車或會增加。視乎現場交通情況，落馬洲管制站及深圳灣口岸在2025年5月9至14日凌晨期間或會實施特別交通安排，以便公共運輸車輛能暢順地進入上述管制站。跨境私家車或需輪候通過口岸。 駕駛人士請特別留意沿途可變信息顯示屏及交通標誌，如遇交通受阻，請保持忍讓及遵從現場警務人員的指示。
